title: asplenium spinulosum var. subtriangulare
intro: Asplenium spinulosum var. subtriangulare, also known as the subtriangular spleenwort, is a type of fern that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Asplenium spinulosum var. subtriangulare are said to include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to make poultices and salves for topical application.
